title: INIT-1.3.1 — Machine-Readable Invariant Registry Substrate
phase_description: Additive scaffolding — registry JSON, id-ledger, source-manifest, loader, contracts type, CI gate

pnpm_verify.note: lint + type-check + build + test all green in worktree

invariant_registry_gate.note: Gate validates: closed-schema, ledger allocation, source-manifest bidirectional coverage, append-only ledger, ratification record, mechanical enforcement

findings_addressed: F2: closed-schema validation — unknown fields in registry/ledger/manifest cause gate to fail
F3: source-manifest bidirectional coverage — every registry ID must have a manifest entry and vice versa
F4: append-only ledger enforcement — IDs present at base cannot be deleted
F5: machine-readable ratification record — source-manifest must carry ratified_by, ratified_at, ratification_ref
F6: workflow path filter corrected — adds scripts/ci/invariant-registry-gate.ts, .github/workflows/invariant-registry-gate.yml, packages/contracts/src/index.ts

source_manifest.ratification_ref: UTV2-1088 / INIT-1.3.1 Phase A PM ratification
